zh.lifeSummary: Eberhard I. von Sayn是Embricho von Sayn-Diez和Demudis von Laurenburg的兒子，於1137年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯納斯奧。他去世於1176年在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥延-可布倫本多福賽享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sayn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hain
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English heghen, a weak plural of hay, from Old English (ge)hæg ‘enclosure’, denoting someone who lived at a farm, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word. See also Haynes .

English: from the Middle English personal name Hain, Heyne. Like Deyn this may be a rhyming pet form of Reynald (see Reginald ) or other names of Norman origin beginning with Rein- such as Reyner and Rainbert. Alternatively, the name may be a variant of Hagan .

English: nickname for a wretched individual, from Middle English hain(e), heyne, hayn ‘wretch, niggard’. In some cases however, it is possible that this name derives from a spelling (not a pronunciation) of hi(g)ne ‘servant’ (see Hine ), with the inverted spelling -ey- for i.

nameMeanings.name: Eberhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Eberhard I. von Sayn was born in 1137, in Nassau, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany as the son of Embricho von Sayn-Diez and Demudis von Laurenburg. He died in 1176, in Sayn, Bendorf, Mayen-Koblenz, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 39.

ko.lifeSummary: Eberhard I. von Sayn(은)는 1137년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-라h-크레이스 나소에서 Embricho von Sayn-Diez(와)과 Demudis von Laurenburg의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1176년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 메이-코블렌즈 벤도르프 지에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Eberhard I. von Sayn родился в 1137 г. в местности нассау, раин-лахн-крис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. Его родителей звали Embricho von Sayn-Diez и Demudis von Laurenburg. Он умер в 1176 г. в местности сеин, бендорф, ландкрис меиен-кобленц, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 39 лет.
